THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATIONS SET FORTH IN WRITTEN ORDER. Plaintiff John Heath's Motion For Protective Order re: Demand For Inspection is denied. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. N. LEE ORMASA, TEL. NO. (707)766-8315 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STUART R. CURRAN OF COLOMBATTO, KLIMENKO, TEL. NO. 391-6182 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING- A R G U E D ; DEFENDANT MONTE CARLO HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, CHRIS KIBRE, DAN FORBES, PATRICIA O'SULLIVAN, JACKLYN CAHILL, WAYNE BARRY'S-MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 12 AND 13 IS DENIED AS TO ASSOCIATION FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN BUT GRANTED AS TO INDIVIDUALS. FORBES ' OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY CONCERNING MANLY'S STATEMENT, SUSTAINED AS HEARSAY BUT ASSOCIATIONS' OBJECTION OVERRULED AS AN ADMISSION. INDIVIDUALS LACK FOUNDATION TO TESTIFY AS TO WHAT ASSOCIATION WAS TOLD OR DID WHEN THEY DID NOT SERVE. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 14, WHICH NAMES NO MOVING PARTY . MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 17 IN FAVOR OF INDIVIDUALS, BUT DENIED AS TO THE ASSOCIATION. RUOFF INTERPRETS CIVIL CODE SECTION 1365.7 AS PROVIDING IMMUNITY.
(SEE NEXT PAGE FOR CONTINUANCE)

Defendant Monte Carlo Homeowners Association, Chris Kibre, Dan Forbes, Patricia O'Sullivan, Jack Chill, Wayne Barry'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: (CONTINUED MINUTES FOR MAY 18, 2007)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 18 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF RAISES A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT BASED ON HIS DECLARATION THAT PROBLEMS HAVE REAPPEARED AFTER WORK WAS PERFORMED. AS TO THE 18TH CAUSE OF ACTION IT IS GRANTED AS TO THE PAST MEMBERS BUT DENIED AS TO PRESENT MEMBERS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO INDIVIDUALS AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 21 BECAUSE ANY EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF HAS AS TO THEM IS HEARSAY, BUT DENIED AS TO ASSOCIATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 23 IS DENIED AS TO ASSOCIATION AND O'SULLIVAN, BUT GRANTED AS TO OTHER INDIVIDUALS AS TO WHOM THERE IS NO NON-HEARSAY EVIDENCE OF ANY ILL WILL. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 24 IS DENIED AS TO O'SULLIVAN, BUT GRANTED AS TO THE OTHER INDIVIDUALS, AS TO WHOM THERE IS NO NON-HEARSAY EVIDENCE OF ANY INTENTIONAL ACTS THAT ARE NOT TIME BARRED THAT WOULD CONSTITUTE A BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PM
